chat.label: Chat
chat.hint: Data-channel chat in the player and meetings.

hiddenQc.label: Hidden QC
hiddenQc.hint: Allows invisible QC/recorder participants (they don't count as viewers).

adaptivePlayer.label: Adaptive player
adaptivePlayer.hint: Simulcast + multi-layer transcode in the player.

rtmpPassword.label: RTMP password
rtmpPassword.hint: Requires a password in addition to the stream key to publish over RTMP.

callbacks.title: Callbacks (outbound webhooks)
callbacks.subtitle: StreamHub sends a signed POST to your URL for EVERY room event. Filter them by the payload's "event" field.
callbacks.urlHint: HTTPS endpoint that receives the POSTs. Empty = callbacks disabled.
callbacks.secretHint: Used for X-StreamHub-Signature: sha256=hmac(secret, body). Verify it on your endpoint.
callbacks.payloadInfo: <0>All</0> classifiable events are posted. The payload is <1>{{payload}}</1> and each request carries the headers <2>X-StreamHub-Event</2> and <3>X-StreamHub-Signature</3>.

featuresCard.title: Features
featuresCard.subtitle: Player and ingress capabilities. Every change is saved automatically (see the status in the top-right).

qc.title: QC token (hidden)
qc.subtitle: Invisible participant for quality control / recording; does not count as a viewer. Requires the "Hidden QC" feature.
qc.error: Could not generate the QC token.

s3.confirmPublic: You are about to make this app's recordings PUBLIC: anyone with the URL (<public_url>/<objectKey>) will be able to view and download them, with no expiration. Confirm?
s3.loadError: Could not load the S3 configuration.
s3.title: S3 storage (recordings / VODs)
s3.subtitle: Destination for the recorded MP4s. Credentials are stored encrypted separately; the s3 block goes into config.yaml.
s3.endpointHint: Empty on AWS. E.g. Wasabi: https://s3.wasabisys.com
s3.publicUrlHint: Public base for deterministic VOD URLs. Empty = presigned URLs are used.
s3.publicWarnBody: With <0>Public URL</0> set, VODs are served as deterministic URLs <1>{{objectPath}}</1> <2>with no expiration</2>: anyone with the link can access them. Recommended to leave it empty (temporary <3>presigned</3> URLs) or use a <4>CDN with a signed URL</4> instead of exposing the bucket.
s3.publicAck: I understand that this app's recordings will be publicly accessible.
s3.privateInfo: Empty <0>Public URL</0> = secure delivery by default: VODs are served with temporary <1>presigned</1> URLs.
s3.storedHint: Already configured. Leave empty to keep it.
s3.saveBlocked: Confirm the warning to enable public access.
